name: Base Game Content
description: Core game content for Chronicles of Aetheria

village.name: Eldoria Village
village.description: A peaceful village nestled in the valley. The air smells of fresh bread and flowers. Villagers go about their daily routines, and children play in the streets.

forest.name: Mystic Forest
forest.description: Ancient trees tower overhead, their branches forming a canopy that filters sunlight into golden beams. Strange creatures rustle in the underbrush.

castle.name: Castle Aetheria
castle.description: A magnificent stone castle with towering spires. The royal banners flutter in the wind. Guards patrol the walls vigilantly.

library.name: Grand Library
library.description: A magnificent library with towering bookshelves filled with ancient tomes. The air smells of old paper and leather. Scholars quietly study at wooden tables.

mountain.name: Thunderpeak Mountains
mountain.description: Jagged peaks pierce the sky, with snow-capped summits and treacherous cliffs. The wind howls through narrow passes.

dungeon.name: Castle Dungeon
dungeon.description: Dark, damp corridors echo with distant moans. Chains rattle and torches flicker. The air is thick with the scent of mildew and despair.

workshop.name: Inventor's Workshop
workshop.description: A cluttered workshop filled with strange devices and half-finished inventions. Gears whir and steam hisses from various contraptions.

blacksmith.name: Thorin Ironfist
blacksmith.dialogue: Welcome to my forge! Need some weapons or armor?

merchant.name: Elara Swift
merchant.dialogue: Fine wares from across the realms! What catches your eye?

healer.name: Sister Mira
healer.dialogue: May the light heal your wounds, traveler.

librarian.name: Archmage Eldrin Voss
librarian.dialogue: Knowledge is the greatest treasure. What wisdom do you seek?
